case_title: LEIGHT WALTERS VS LOMBARD TIRE & BRAKE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,300.00 FILED BY LEIGHT WALTERS AS TO DEFENDANT LOMBARD TIRE & BRAKE TOSCALITO ENTERPRISES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TOSCALITO ENTERPRISES INC.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOMBARD TIRE & BRAKE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEIGHT WALTERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOMBARD TIRE & BRAKE TOSCALITO ENTERPRISES INC. $3,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,915.00, $1900 SPENT WITH DEFENDANT AND $2000 SPENT AT HAN'S AUTO REPAIR.
